Records.authors: Thomas Gehrmann, Lorenzo Tancredi, Erich Weihs
Records.description: The authors give the two-loop four-point master integrals with two massive external legs, with the same mass (in the appendix). All results are given in terms of generalized harmonic polylogarithms and all integrals have a common prefactor given in Eq. A.1. This integral can have a numerator (the epsilon order is then $-2,-1,0$ or $-4,-3-2,-1,0$; see the paper for more details).

Records.authors: Thomas Gehrmann, Andreas von Manteuffel, Lorenzo Tancredi, Erich Weihs
Records.description: The authors compute the full set of massless two-loop four-point functions with two off-shell legs with the same invariant mass relevant for diboson production at hadron colliders ($q\bar{q}\to VV$ and $gg\to VV$). The $\varepsilon$ expansion is given in terms of multiple polylogarithms of uniform weight through to weight four. Results for physical scattering kinematics are optimized for numerical evaluations using $\operatorname{Li}_{2,2}$, $\operatorname{Li}_n$ and $\log$ functions. In addition, expansions are provided at the production threshold and in the small mass limit.

Two-loop planar 4-point topology with massless internal lines and two on-shell massive external legs $p_3^2=m_3^2$, $p_4^2=m_4^2$ ($V V'$); called VV1 in the paper. 31 master integrals; canonical basis with a 12-letter alphabet in variables $(x,y,z)$ built from $(1+x)(1+xy)=s/m_3^2$, $-xz=t/m_3^2$, $x^2 y=m_4^2/m_3^2$. Contributes to NNLO QCD corrections to massive vector-boson pair production. Canonical basis computed with CANONICA in about 8 minutes.
Records.familyName: 2-loop 4-point double box with two massive external legs (VV topology 1) / 2-loop 4-point non-planar double box with two massive external legs (VV topology 2) / 2-loop 4-point planar double box with two massive external legs (VV topology 2)

Records.description: Two-loop 4-point topology with massless internal lines and two on-shell massive external legs p3^2=m3^2, p4^2=m4^2 (V V'); called VV2 in the paper. 29 master integrals; 14-letter alphabet in (x,y,z). Contributes to NNLO QCD corrections to massive vector-boson pair production. Canonical basis computed with CANONICA in about 15 minutes.
